channel.title: JLT FAM Trips (Facebook)
channel.description: Agent FAM trip features from JLT Group … firsthand trip reports for the JLT community

item.title: Niamh's Turkey FAM trip with Holiday Best 🌍
item.description:
Big shoutout to Niamh Considine, who has returned from Holiday Best's FAM trip to Turkey with twenty-two hotels under her belt and 70,000 steps to show for it. ✈️
Six days, a sun-soaked coastline, and standout properties including Berry Blue Resort, Belek Beach Resort, and NG Phaselis Bay… Niamh did not hold back.
From coffee-cup gifts at NG Phaselis Bay to a rollercoaster ride at Land of Legends right before closing time, she came back with destination knowledge you cannot get from a brochure. 🌍 That is what FAM trips are all about… and Turkey is now a whole lot more sellable for our community.
Full blog on the website… link in the comments 🔗
